parsed_review.summary: Read-only static review of CP00-617 (RP20 Data Room & VDR, P02.M07.S03-S12; risk A; 10 units; 6 implementation / 2 security_audit / 2 ui; all micro "Test And Golden Case Set"). The descriptor-only implementation is internally consistent and complete: registry CP617 binding and PROGRAM_CONTRACT pointers are correct (upstream CP00-616, next CP00-618, next_subphase RP20.P02.M07.S13); section rows P02_SERVICE_ROWS.slice(2,12) map exactly to S03-S12, and the 6/2/2 deliverable split is verified against the actual title-classification sets (Permission/Audit precheck -> security_audit; State transition/Lock -> ui). freezeCp617Result forces all runtime-dispatch/write/persistence flags false and references CP617_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION, which extends the CP616 attestation with test_golden_case_core_runtime_opened:false; validators enforce coverage, descriptor-only boundaries, and the authority boundary; tests cover coverage, descriptor-only, and contract-projection deepEqual; the validator .mjs script is fully wired; contract projections (cp617_pack_binding/requirements/no_write_attestation incl. the new field at line 1577, and packs.cp617_*) match package code; README has the #cp00-617 anchor and index.js re-exports via export *. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are attested and tested. Authority boundary is preserved: Claude is read-only and not final approver, human final approval is required for enterprise trust/runtime opening, local validation does not claim enterprise trust, and Hermes is used only for a deterministic evidence-packet/receipt descriptor (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false), not product runtime. CP178+ review-evidence hardening is satisfied: auth preflight passed (exit 0, valid JSON, non-zero stdout), prompt is 2135B with no embedded full diff/source, read tools were used, no forbidden tools, and no active untracked implementation files were omitted; the unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook/*, ldip-integration, docx) are correctly recorded as preserved and out of pack scope. The pack is in the expected pre-review pending_review state (manifest production_ready:false/in_progress; command-evidence, adjudication, construction-inspection all pending_review; claude-review-result.json is the PENDING_REVIEW placeholder) awaiting normalization of this review. production_ready denotes descriptor-verified only; runtime_ready remains false (no runtime opened). Final closeout validation execution and human approval remain gates outside this read-only review. No P0-P3 findings identified; this review does not block pack closeout and does not block goal closeout.
